implemented: Closed Tier A/B/C recovery policy makes package metadata Tier A and backup-only.
Referenced Tier A/B authority requires backup; it cannot be silently rebuilt or omitted.
Optional Tier C bulk may be rebuilt or omitted only with source, rebuild-recipe, and toolchain hash evidence.
Deterministic recovery reports account backup and optional-bulk bytes and fail closed on unknown tiers, duplicate identities, invalid hashes, invalid sizes, or missing rebuild inputs.
remaining_acceptance: Build the matrix from actual package metadata, dataset/model references, and governed storage inventory.
Add CLI publication and bind the matrix hash into backup/restore evidence.
Exercise backup, rebuild, and omission routes on a clean-root recovery fixture and then the governed live restore drill.
claim_boundary: This proves the closed recovery-policy evaluator and fixtures only. It does not classify the live corpus, copy or delete bulk files, execute a live recovery matrix, or complete MF-P9-12.05.
